description.en: Hopfield networks connected neural computation with physics. A pattern could be stored as an attractor in an energy landscape, and a noisy input could settle back into the closest memory. This made associative memory, optimization, and neural dynamics part of the same conceptual frame.
description.zh: Hopfield 网络把神经计算与物理学连接起来。一个模式可以作为能量地形中的吸引子被存储，带噪输入则会收敛回最接近的记忆。它把联想记忆、优化和神经动力学放进同一个概念框架。

html.en: Before deep learning, researchers were already asking how large sets of simple units could compute collectively. Hopfield gave this question an energy-based formulation.
html.zh: 在深度学习之前，研究者已经在追问大量简单单元如何集体计算。Hopfield 给这个问题提供了基于能量的表述。

html.en: The network updates units to reduce an energy function, so stored memories become stable attractors.
html.zh: 网络更新单元以降低能量函数，因此被存储的记忆会成为稳定吸引子。

html.en: Experts generally treat Hopfield networks as central to the history of energy-based neural computation. Their long-term legacy is the connection between memory, optimization, attractor dynamics, and statistical physics.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Hopfield 网络视为基于能量的神经计算史中的核心成果。它的长期影响在于连接了记忆、优化、吸引子动力学和统计物理。

method.zh: 吸引子动力学与能量最小化

material.en: PNAS paper and Nobel Prize profile
material.zh: PNAS 论文与诺贝尔奖人物资料

demo.en: Noisy pattern settles into a stored memory
demo.zh: 带噪模式收敛到已存记忆

text.en: A stored pattern is a stable state that nearby noisy patterns tend to approach.
text.zh: 已存模式是稳定状态，附近的带噪模式倾向于靠近它。

text.en: The network changes state in a direction that lowers energy.
text.zh: 网络沿着降低能量的方向改变状态。

text.en: Partial or corrupted inputs can recover a complete stored pattern.
text.zh: 部分或损坏输入可以恢复完整存储模式。

description.en: Primary source for recurrent associative memory; local images redraw energy and attractor dynamics.
description.zh: 递归联想记忆的原始来源；本地图重画能量与吸引子动力学。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

label.en: Nobel Prize: John J. Hopfield facts
label.zh: Nobel Prize: 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德 facts
